queries.question: What type of building types are associated with each architect?
queries.sql: SELECT Building_Types.type  from Architects_Building_Types join Building_Types on Architects_Building_Types.building_type_id = Building_Types.id join Architects on Architects_Building_Types.architect_id = Architects.id   GROUP BY Architects_Building_Types.building_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Architects_Building_Types.architect_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Architects)

queries.question: What type of building types are associated with each architect?
queries.sql: select architects.name , building_types.type from Architects_Building_Types join Building_Types on Architects_Building_Types.building_type_id = Building_Types.id join Architects on Architects_Building_Types.architect_id = Architects.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?architects_building_types a :Architects_Building_Types .
  ?building_types a :Building_Types .
  ?architects_building_types p:hasBuilding_Types ?building_types .
  ?architects a :Architects .
  ?architects_building_types p:hasArchitects ?architects .
  ?architects p:name ?name .
  ?building_types p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What type of building types are associated with each architect?
